info.description: A simple task tracker API built with Go and MongoDB
info.title: Task Tracker API

get.description: Retrieve boards filtered by destination ID
Retrieve a single board by ID
Validate a numeric ID from the URL path

patch.description: Update the name of a column. Valid names are todo, in progress, completed. All tasks in the column automatically reflect the new name via $lookup.

post.description: Create a new board under a destination

get.description: Get paginated tasks for a board with optional filters

post.description: Create a new task on a board. A default todo column is created automatically if one does not exist for the board.

get.description: Get a single task by ID with column details populated

delete.description: Permanently delete a task by ID

patch.description: Update one or more fields of an existing task. Only provided fields are updated.
Move a task to a different column

get.description: Retrieve all teams for the authenticated user
Retrieve a single team by ID

delete.description: Delete a team and all associated data

post.description: Add a new member to a team using email and role

delete.description: Remove a member from a team
